sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Short Interest in Similarweb Ltd. (NYSE:SMWB) Expands By 23.1%
feed.summary: Similarweb Ltd. (NYSE:SMWB) experienced a 23.1% increase in short interest in January, reaching 615,619 shares, representing about 0.7% of its shares sold short. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week low with a market capitalization of $337.9 million and a negative P/E ratio, despite receiving a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $10.08. Institutional investors hold approximately 57.6% of the company's stock.

feed.title: How Urogen Pharma Ltd. (URGN) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing
feed.summary: This article analyzes Urogen Pharma Ltd. (URGN) for rotational strategy timing, highlighting weak near-term sentiment but strong mid and long-term outlooks. It identifies an exceptional risk-reward setup and provides three distinct AI-generated trading strategies tailored for different risk profiles and holding periods, focusing on position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal analysis with key support and resistance levels.

feed.title: How Direxion Daily Tsla Bear 1x Shares (TSLS) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing

It outlines three distinct AI-generated trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels. The analysis also provides multi-timeframe signal strengths, support, and resistance levels to guide potential trading decisions.

feed.title: Direxion Daily TSLA Bear 1X Shares (NASDAQ:TSLS) Shares Set to Reverse Split on Thursday, March 5th
feed.summary: The Direxion Daily TSLA Bear 1X Shares (NASDAQ:TSLS) are scheduled for a 1-for-10 reverse stock split on March 5th, with shareholder holdings adjusted after market close on March 4th. This ETF provides inverse exposure to Tesla's daily price movements. Direxion also recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.0495, resulting in an annualized yield of 3.6%.

feed.title: Waste Management Market is expected to reach US$ 1.9 trillion by 2030 | Major Companies - Veolia, Suez, Waste Management Inc, FCC Environment CEE
feed.summary: The global Waste Management Market, valued at US$ 1.5 trillion in 2022, is projected to grow to US$ 1.9 trillion by 2030, exhibiting a CAGR of 3.0% during the forecast period of 2024-2031. This growth is driven by urbanization, industrialization, and environmental regulations, pushing for enhanced resource efficiency and circular economy initiatives. Key players in this market include Veolia, Suez, and Waste Management Inc., with recent developments showing an increasing focus on advanced waste-to-energy conversion, e-waste processing expansion, and recycling infrastructure upgrades in various regions.

feed.title: SLB Secures Offshore Drilling Agreements for Indonesia’s Tangkulo Deepwater Project
feed.summary: SLB has secured multiple offshore drilling service contracts from Mubadala Energy for the Tangkulo deepwater natural gas development in Indonesia's Andaman Sea. The agreements cover exploration, appraisal, and development drilling, with SLB providing a comprehensive suite of services to ensure operational efficiency and safety. This project is a key investment for Mubadala Energy and aims for first gas production by the end of 2028, utilizing advanced offshore technologies to support Indonesia's energy objectives.

feed.title: What Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY)'s Earnings Rebound and Completed Buybacks Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) reported a significant earnings rebound in Q4 2025, swinging from a net loss in 2024 to a $7.05 billion net profit, despite flat annual revenue. This recovery, alongside the completion of a nearly $30 billion share repurchase program, refocuses the company's investment narrative on pipeline progress and Eliquis-driven guidance rather than financial engineering. The article highlights that future growth is contingent on managing upcoming patent expiries and pricing pressures, with analysts offering varied forecasts for revenue and earnings.

feed.title: Molecular Diagnostics Market is expected to reach US$ 37.19 billion by 2033 | Major key players - Hologic Inc, F. Hoffmann-La Roche Ltd, Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc, Abbott Laboratories, QIAGEN N.V
feed.summary: The global Molecular Diagnostics Market is projected to reach US$ 37.19 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 5.8% from US$ 21.01 billion in 2024. Key market players include Hologic Inc, F. Hoffmann-La Roche Ltd, and Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. Recent developments in the US and Japan highlight advancements in cancer detection, infectious disease testing, and personalized medicine, driven by new technologies and regulatory approvals.

feed.title: Agricultural Soil Amendments Market See Incredible Growth
feed.summary: The agricultural soil amendments market is experiencing incredible growth, driven by increasing demand for organic farming and enhanced soil quality. A new report by Coherent Market Insights Pvt. Ltd provides an in-depth analysis of market trends, growth drivers, and competitor landscapes, forecasting significant expansion from 2026 to 2033. Key players in this market include BASF SE, Corteva Agriscience, Nutrien Ltd., and Yara International, utilizing various organic, inorganic, bio-based, and chemical amendments.

feed.title: Citigroup Incoming CFO Lucchetti Targets Higher Returns, Flags Resilient Consumer Credit at Conference
feed.summary: Citigroup's incoming CFO, Gonzalo Lucchetti, outlined his priorities, focusing on achieving consistent higher returns and emphasizing execution discipline. He highlighted the resilience of U.S. consumer credit due to a prime-centric customer base and opposed proposed credit card APR caps, warning of potential negative impacts on credit availability. Lucchetti also detailed strategies for USPB performance, firm-wide efficiency goals, and the deployment of AI for productivity gains.

feed.title: Masimo Heads For $10B Buyout After Winning Blood Oxygen Patent Case Against Apple
feed.summary: Med-tech firm Masimo is reportedly nearing a $10 billion buyout by Danaher Corp. following its successful patent infringement case against Apple regarding blood oxygen monitoring technology. Masimo, which recently underwent an organizational realignment and sold its consumer audio business, had a market capitalization of $7 billion last Friday. The deal would mark another significant acquisition for Danaher, which has been expanding its healthcare portfolio.

feed.title: Danaher Nears $10 Billion Acquisition of Masimo
feed.summary: Danaher (DHR) is reportedly close to acquiring Masimo (MASI) for approximately $10 billion, a move that would significantly bolster Danaher's position in the medical technology sector. This acquisition, if finalized, would be Danaher's largest since its $21.4 billion purchase of Cytiva, showcasing its continued investment in biotechnology. Despite a recent decline in Masimo's stock, this deal is expected to provide Danaher with new growth opportunities given the sustained demand for medical devices.

feed.title: Wipro Ltd Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Sector-Aligned Gains and Institutional Interest
feed.summary: Wipro Ltd saw robust trading activity on February 17, 2026, with significant value turnover and volume, reflecting renewed investor interest despite the stock trading below key moving averages. The company's market position is strong with a large market cap, and increased delivery volumes suggest institutional accumulation. Despite a recent downgrade to "Hold" by analysts, its attractive dividend yield and sector-aligned performance make it a consideration for long-term investors.

feed.title: Danaher nears $10B acquisition of medical tech company Masimo, FT reports (DHR:NYSE)
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation (DHR) is reportedly close to acquiring medical technology company Masimo (MASI) in a deal valued at approximately $10 billion. The Financial Times stated that the acquisition of the California-based firm could be announced as early as Tuesday.

feed.title: Wipro, KPIT, and 6 other IT stocks trading near their 52-week lows; Do you own any?
feed.summary: Several IT stocks, including L&T Technology Services, Wipro, Cyient, and KPIT, are trading near their 52-week lows due to market pressures and concerns over AI-driven disruption. The article details how advanced AI tools could potentially impact traditional IT services, leading to increased volatility and a sell-off in the sector. Despite the risks, Nomura suggests that IT services valuations are currently in the value zone, trading below historical averages.

feed.title: BRBR Investors Have Opportunity to Lead BellRing Brands, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is actively encouraging investors who purchased BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE: BRBR) securities between November 19, 2024, and August 4, 2025, to join a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that BellRing made false and misleading statements, claiming strong customer demand while sales were actually driven by temporary inventory stockpiling, leading to investor losses. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm by March 23, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Neogen Corporation (NASDAQ:NEOG) Short Interest Down 15.8% in January
feed.summary: Neogen Corporation (NASDAQ:NEOG) experienced a 15.8% decrease in short interest in January, totaling 11,865,302 shares, representing approximately 5.5% of its shares sold short. Major institutional investors, particularly Goldman Sachs, increased their stakes, while the company reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings but a significant negative net margin. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $10.67.

feed.title: Piramal Finance shares in focus after S&P Global rating upgrade
feed.summary: Piramal Finance's shares are gaining attention following an upgrade in its long-term issuer credit rating by S&P Global Ratings. The upgrade to 'BBB+' with a stable outlook reflects the company's strengthened market position and financial performance. This positive rating adjustment is expected to influence investor sentiment and potentially impact the company's stock performance.

feed.title: LATAM Airlines Group S.A. (NYSE:LTM) Short Interest Down 18.2% in January
feed.summary: LATAM Airlines Group S.A. (NYSE:LTM) saw a significant decrease in short interest in January, falling 18.2% to 2,287,144 shares. This represents approximately 0.8% of the company's outstanding shares, with a short-interest ratio of 2.2 days based on average trading volume. The company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $1.69 and revenue of $3.95 billion, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $69.55.

feed.title: Danaher nears $10 bln deal to buy med tech firm Masimo- FT
feed.summary: U.S. healthcare firm Danaher Corp is reportedly close to a $10 billion deal to acquire medical technology company Masimo Corporation. The acquisition would value Masimo at a premium to its current market capitalization and could be announced as early as Tuesday. Masimo is known for manufacturing medical monitoring devices and has been involved in an intellectual property dispute with Apple Inc.

feed.title: Wipro Ltd Sees Elevated Trading Volumes Amid Mixed Technical Signals
feed.summary: Wipro Ltd (WIPRO) experienced a significant surge in trading volume on February 17, 2026, with over 56.95 lakh shares traded, despite only a modest 1.38% price gain. The stock is near its 52-week low, trading below all key moving averages, yet delivery volumes indicate growing investor confidence and potential accumulation. While mixed technical signals suggest caution, value investors might find the current price attractive, supported by a high dividend yield of 5.16%.

feed.title: 12 Dividend Stocks With High Insider Buying
feed.summary: The article highlights dividend stocks experiencing significant insider buying, focusing on Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp. (NYSE:OTF) as an example. It details recent substantial share purchases by OTF's President, Erik Bissonnette, and the company's recent $400 million Notes issuance to refinance debt. Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp. provides direct lending and equity investments to upper middle-market technology and software firms.

feed.title: FFIV Investors Have Opportunity to Lead F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) for alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit claims F5 made false and misleading statements regarding its security and ability to meet customer needs, especially after a security incident. Investors who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before February 17, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Danaher nears $10 bln deal to buy med tech firm Masimo- FT
feed.summary: U.S. healthcare firm Danaher Corp is reportedly close to a nearly $10 billion deal to acquire medical technology company Masimo Corporation. The Financial Times stated that an announcement could come as early as Tuesday. This acquisition would value Masimo at a premium to its current $7 billion market capitalization, continuing Danaher's aggressive history of dealmaking.

feed.title: ElevenEs is backed by Caterpillar Venture Capital, Inc - Construction of its 1GWh LFP Battery Cell Mega Factory to Begin in February 2026
feed.summary: ElevenEs has completed the first closing of its Series B investment round, with support from Caterpillar Venture Capital, Inc. and an affiliate of BST (HK) Ltd. This funding will initiate the construction of a 1GWh LFP battery cell mega-factory in Subotica, Serbia, with operations expected to begin in 2027. The factory will specialize in high-performance LFP blade prismatic cells for industrial vehicles, battery electric vehicles, and energy storage systems, aiming to create over 350 jobs and strengthen Europe's battery manufacturing capabilities.

feed.title: RGC Resources Inc. (NASDAQ:RGCO) Short Interest Down 16.9% in January
feed.summary: RGC Resources Inc. (NASDAQ:RGCO) experienced a 16.9% decrease in short interest in January, reaching 60,531 shares. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.2175, now yielding 4.0%, and saw positive shifts in analyst ratings from Weiss Ratings and Wall Street Zen. Institutional ownership remains significant, with several funds increasing their stakes.

feed.title: Blackstone Secured Lending Fund Sees Deal “Escape Velocity,” Stays Disciplined on Leverage and AI Risk
feed.summary: Blackstone Secured Lending Fund (BXSL) is experiencing an improved deal environment, termed "escape velocity," with direct lending activity up over 50% quarter-over-quarter and defaults down 30% in 2025. Co-CEO Jonathan Bock highlighted disciplined capital management, maintaining leverage around 1.15x–1.2x and emphasizing long-term NAV preservation in dividend policy. The fund also addresses AI risk in its software portfolio by focusing on strong subordination, broad diversification, and underwriting moat-focused businesses.

feed.title: Danaher closes in on a nearly $10bn deal for med tech company Masimo - FT
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation is reportedly nearing a deal to acquire medical technology company Masimo for approximately $10 billion, according to a report by the Financial Times. This news follows several recent updates concerning Danaher, including a director's retirement and various analyst price target adjustments, indicating active financial and strategic movements for the company.

feed.title: F5, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact the DJS Law Group to Discuss Your Rights - FFIV
feed.summary: The DJS Law Group has announced a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) for alleged securities law violations. The lawsuit claims F5 made false and misleading statements regarding its security practices, particularly in light of a security incident that could affect customers and future growth. Investors who purchased FFIV shares between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss potential lead plaintiff appointments and recovery of losses.

feed.title: FFIV Investors Have Opportunity to Lead F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (FFIV) for alleged securities fraud, stemming from purported false and misleading statements about the company's security and ability to meet customer needs. Investors who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm by February 17, 2026, to potentially lead the lawsuit and recover damages suffered due to a security incident. The lawsuit alleges that F5's public statements were materially misleading, especially after a security incident compromised customer data and growth prospects.

feed.title: Over 20 families sue Boeing over South Korea's deadliest air crash
feed.summary: Over 20 families are suing Boeing following the deadly Jeju Air Flight 7C 2216 crash in December 2024, which killed 179 people. The lawsuits, consolidated in federal court in western Washington, allege that Boeing used outdated safety systems in its 737-800 aircraft to avoid expensive redesigns. This litigation comes as Boeing faces increasing scrutiny and financial losses related to other safety issues.

feed.title: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE:TRTX) Sees Large Drop in Short Interest
feed.summary: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE:TRTX) experienced a significant 17.9% drop in short interest in January, totaling 3,146,921 shares as of January 30th. This translates to 4.1% of the company's stock being short-sold, with a days-to-cover ratio of 3.6 days based on its average daily volume. Analyst ratings reflect a "Hold" consensus with a $10.75 price target, and the company pays a quarterly dividend yielding 10.9%.

feed.title: Booking (BKNG) to report earnings tomorrow: Here is what to expect
feed.summary: This article announces that Booking Holdings (BKNG) is scheduled to report its earnings tomorrow. It indicates that the content will provide expectations for the upcoming earnings report.

feed.title: What To Expect From Omnicom Group's (OMC) Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Omnicom Group (OMC) is set to report its Q4 earnings, with analysts expecting a 4.1% year-on-year revenue growth to $4.50 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.94 per share. The company has generally met or exceeded revenue estimates in the past two years, and analysts have reconfirmed their estimates. Despite recent underperformance in the media & entertainment sector and a stock price down 11.6% in the last month, the average analyst price target for OMC is $101.10.

feed.title: Activist Elliott builds over 10% stake in Norwegian Cruise Line, WSJ reports
feed.summary: Activist investor Elliott Management has reportedly acquired a stake of over 10% in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings, with intentions to push for changes within the company. The Wall Street Journal reported Elliott's plans to improve Norwegian Cruise Line's financial performance and guest experience, noting that its shares lost over 11% in 2025 while rivals gained. Elliott has also approached former Royal Caribbean president and COO Adam Goldstein as a potential board nominee for Norwegian Cruise.

feed.title: Xcel Energy says bad weather not likely to require planned outages
feed.summary: Xcel Energy announced that the severe weather expected to hit Colorado in the coming days is not anticipated to necessitate planned power outages. This update comes amidst concerns about potential service disruptions due to the inclement weather.

feed.title: Analog Devices Earnings Report 2026: Revenue Forecast & Analyst Expectations - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Analog Devices is expected to announce its Q4 2026 earnings soon, with analysts projecting a revenue of $3.11 billion, marking a 28.5% increase year-over-year. The company has a strong history of surpassing revenue expectations and investor sentiment in the analog semiconductors sector is currently positive. This report details the company's past performance, analyst forecasts, and market trends within the industry.

feed.title: Over 1,000 without power in Madera, PG&E to make repairs after weather passes
feed.summary: Over 1,000 PG&E customers in Madera, California, lost power Monday night due to an unplanned outage, which was initially reported at 6 p.m. and affected 1,371 customers. PG&E has not provided an estimated restoration time, stating that crews are dealing with storm damage emergencies and will only make repairs after the extreme weather passes. Customers can check the PG&E Outage Center online to see if their property is affected.
feed.source: CBS47 and KSEE24 | News from YourCentralValley.com
feed.source_domain: CBS47 and KSEE24 | News from YourCentralValley.com

feed.title: Heartland Express Q4 results: loss driven by one‑time charges, operating ratio edges better
feed.summary: Heartland Express reported a Q4 net loss of $19.4 million due mainly to a $19 million impairment charge from integrating the CFI fleet, though adjusted EPS beat consensus. Revenue dropped 26% year-over-year, but the adjusted operating ratio showed sequential improvement. The company is actively consolidating operations, pruning unprofitable lanes, and strengthening its balance sheet, aiming for long-term profitability and a debt-free status.

feed.title: Baird Upgrades Wells Fargo (WFC)
feed.summary: Baird has upgraded Wells Fargo (WFC) from Underperform to Neutral, with an average one-year price target of $103.14/share, suggesting an 18.57% upside. Institutional ownership in Wells Fargo has seen some shifts, with a slight decrease in the number of reporting funds and total shares owned by institutions, while the put/call ratio indicates a bearish outlook. Major holders like Jpmorgan Chase and Vanguard funds continue to report significant positions in the company.

feed.title: Assessing Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Valuation As Space And Defense Contracts Support Fresh Growth Momentum
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) is attracting attention due to new space and defense contracts, including producing infrared modules for the Space Development Agency. The company's stock has seen strong returns over the past year. While one valuation narrative suggests TDY is slightly undervalued at $674 compared to its current price of $660.29, a DCF model points to a fair value of $573, indicating it might be overvalued.

feed.title: Transocean (RIG) – Among the Energy Stocks that Gained This Week
feed.summary: Transocean (RIG) saw a significant stock price surge of 21.34% between February 6 and February 13, 2026, driven by its announced acquisition of Valaris in an all-stock deal valued at $5.8 billion. This merger will expand Transocean's drilling services and is expected to generate over $200 million in cost synergies. Additionally, new contract fixtures for its rigs in Norway, totaling $184 million, contributed to the stock's positive performance.

feed.title: Charlotte Wolf Tarfa is now VP-people & culture, India & southwest Asia, The Coca-Cola Company
feed.summary: Charlotte Wolf Tarfa has been promoted to VP-People & Culture for India & Southwest Asia at The Coca-Cola Company. She joined the company in 2021 and previously served as VP-Global Talent Strategy and Succession. In her new role, Tarfa will oversee the people strategy, aligning talent, culture, and leadership development with the company's regional growth ambitions.

feed.title: Imperial Petroleum (IMPP) authorizes $10 million share repurchase program
feed.summary: Imperial Petroleum Inc. (NASDAQ: IMPP) has announced that its Board of Directors has approved a share repurchase program, allowing the company to buy back up to $10 million of its common shares. The repurchase program aims to enhance shareholder value and will be executed periodically through open market transactions or privately negotiated deals, subject to market conditions and regulatory considerations.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Mister Car Wash (MCW) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Mister Car Wash (MCW) is set to announce its Q4 earnings this Wednesday after the bell. Analysts anticipate a revenue growth of 4.3% year over year to $262 million and adjusted earnings of $0.10 per share. The company has a mixed record of meeting revenue estimates, having missed four times in the last two years.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean named official Miami World Cup 2026 host city supporter
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean has partnered with the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Miami Host Committee, becoming the Official Miami World Cup 2026 Host City Supporter. This partnership aims to deliver unique fan experiences through interactive activations, including a fan zone at the FIFA Fan Festival™ Miami at Bayfront Park. Both organizations, deeply rooted in Miami, plan to create a lasting legacy for the community through this collaboration, bringing together sports, culture, and travel.

feed.title: Verisk Earnings: What To Look For From VRSK
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) is set to announce its earnings this Wednesday before market open. Analysts expect a 5.1% year-on-year revenue growth to $773.5 million and adjusted earnings of $1.60 per share, despite the company missing revenue expectations last quarter. The stock has underperformed its peers and the broader data & business process services segment, with shares down 17.6% over the last month.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Insulet (PODD) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation (PODD) is set to report its Q4 earnings on Wednesday morning, with analysts expecting a 28.6% year-on-year revenue growth to $768.2 million and adjusted earnings of $1.46 per share. The company has consistently beaten revenue estimates in the past two years, and its peers like ResMed and DexCom have also shown positive Q4 results. Despite some market underperformance in the healthcare equipment sector, Insulet maintains a strong average analyst price target.

feed.title: What To Expect From Omnicom Group’s (OMC) Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Omnicom Group (OMC) is set to report its Q4 earnings on Wednesday, with analysts expecting a revenue growth of 4.1% year-on-year to $4.50 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.94 per share. The company has a history of exceeding revenue estimates and analysts have reconfirmed their estimates, suggesting stability. While the media & entertainment segment has generally underperformed, Omnicom Group's stock is down 11.6% over the last month, yet it holds an average analyst price target significantly higher than its current share price.
